def transform(grid):
    R,C=len(grid),len(grid[0])
    from collections import Counter
    bg=Counter(v for row in grid for v in row).most_common(1)[0][0]
    visited=[[False]*C for _ in range(R)]
    frags=[]
    for sr in range(R):
        for sc in range(C):
            if grid[sr][sc]!=bg and not visited[sr][sc]:
                stk=[(sr,sc)]; cells=[]
                while stk:
                    r,c=stk.pop()
                    if r<0 or r>=R or c<0 or c>=C or visited[r][c] or grid[r][c]==bg: continue
                    visited[r][c]=True; cells.append((r,c,grid[r][c]))
                    for dr,dc in [(-1,0),(1,0),(0,-1),(0,1)]: stk.append((r+dr,c+dc))
                if cells: frags.append(cells)
    if not frags: return [list(r) for r in grid]
    all_cells=[(r,c,v) for frag in frags for r,c,v in frag]
    mr=max(r for r,c,v in all_cells)-min(r for r,c,v in all_cells)+1
    mc=max(c for r,c,v in all_cells)-min(c for r,c,v in all_cells)+1
    r0=min(r for r,c,v in all_cells); c0=min(c for r,c,v in all_cells)
    out=[[bg]*mc for _ in range(mr)]
    for r,c,v in all_cells: out[r-r0][c-c0]=v
    return out

def transform(grid):
    R,C=len(grid),len(grid[0])
    from collections import Counter
    bg=Counter(v for row in grid for v in row).most_common(1)[0][0]
    frags={}
    visited=[[False]*C for _ in range(R)]
    for sr in range(R):
        for sc in range(C):
            v=grid[sr][sc]
            if v!=bg and not visited[sr][sc]:
                stk=[(sr,sc)]; cells=[]
                while stk:
                    r,c=stk.pop()
                    if r<0 or r>=R or c<0 or c>=C or visited[r][c] or grid[r][c]!=v: continue
                    visited[r][c]=True; cells.append((r,c))
                    for dr,dc in [(-1,0),(1,0),(0,-1),(0,1)]: stk.append((r+dr,c+dc))
                frags.setdefault(v,[]).extend(cells)
    if not frags: return [list(r) for r in grid]
    all_cells=[(r,c,v) for v,cells in frags.items() for r,c in cells]
    r0=min(r for r,c,v in all_cells); r1=max(r for r,c,v in all_cells)
    c0=min(c for r,c,v in all_cells); c1=max(c for r,c,v in all_cells)
    out=[[bg]*(c1-c0+1) for _ in range(r1-r0+1)]
    for r,c,v in all_cells: out[r-r0][c-c0]=v
    return out

def transform(grid):
    R,C=len(grid),len(grid[0])
    from collections import Counter
    bg=Counter(v for row in grid for v in row).most_common(1)[0][0]
    non_bg=[(r,c,grid[r][c]) for r in range(R) for c in range(C) if grid[r][c]!=bg]
    if not non_bg: return [list(r) for r in grid]
    r0=min(r for r,c,v in non_bg); r1=max(r for r,c,v in non_bg)
    c0=min(c for r,c,v in non_bg); c1=max(c for r,c,v in non_bg)
    out=[[bg]*(c1-c0+1) for _ in range(r1-r0+1)]
    for r,c,v in non_bg: out[r-r0][c-c0]=v
    return out

def transform(grid):
    return [list(r) for r in grid]
